mapper.select: select album_id, deceased_id, image_url, thumbnail_url, description, sort_order, create_time from mem_deceased_album where deceased_id = #{deceasedId} order by sort_order asc, create_time asc
mapper.insert: insert into mem_deceased_album (deceased_id, image_url, thumbnail_url, description, sort_order, create_time) values (#{deceasedId}, #{imageUrl}, #{thumbnailUrl}, #{description}, #{sortOrder}, #{createTime})

insert into mem_deceased_album (deceased_id, image_url, thumbnail_url, description, sort_order, create_time) values
(#{item.deceasedId}, #{item.imageUrl}, #{item.thumbnailUrl}, #{item.description}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.createTime})
mapper.delete:
delete from mem_deceased_album where album_id in
#{albumId}
